description: Polish kruche ciasto uses 3:2:1 ratio (flour:fat:sugar) or 2:1 flour:fat for unsweetened. Cold fat coated in flour creates flaky, tender texture by inhibiting gluten.

technique.fat_temperature: butter must be cold (4-6°C) — warm butter melts into flour, no flakiness
technique.mixing_method: rub cold butter into flour with fingertips or pulse in food processor until breadcrumb texture — pea-sized butter pieces for flakiness
technique.liquid_addition: add egg yolks/water 1 tbsp at a time, mix only until dough just comes together
technique.resting: wrap, refrigerate minimum 30 min — gluten relaxes, fat firms up
technique.blind_baking: line with parchment + weights, bake 180°C 15 min, remove weights, 5 min more

failure_modes.fix: chill butter and even the bowl before starting
stop mixing the moment dough holds together — overworking develops gluten
always rest minimum 30 min refrigerated, ideally overnight
add water drop by drop — sweet shortcrust needs no water if enough egg yolks

description: Authentic Polish sernik uses twaróg (farmer's cheese) not cream cheese. Fat twaróg (tłusty) is essential — low-fat causes cracking and dry texture. The ratio is 1kg twaróg per 4-5 eggs.

classic_sernik_1kg.note: grind twaróg through mincer or blend until perfectly smooth — lumps cause uneven baking

technique.cheese_prep: pass twaróg through meat grinder twice or blend until silky — critical for smooth texture
technique.mixing: beat butter + sugar until pale, add yolks one by one, fold in twaróg, fold in starch, fold in stiff egg whites last
technique.egg_whites: whip to stiff peaks, fold gently — gives lightness without density of all-yolk sernik
technique.baking: 160°C conventional, 50-60 min — sernik is done when edges set but center jiggles slightly
technique.cooling: turn off oven, crack door open, cool in oven 30 min — prevents cracking from temperature shock

failure_modes.fix: always use tłusty twaróg (full-fat farmer's cheese)
grind twice through mincer or use blender

failure_modes.case: oven too hot or baked too long
failure_modes.fix: 160°C max, remove when center still wobbles, cool gradually in oven
